item.title: Fresh & Ready Foods LLC: Fresh to You Burger Chicken Fillet, SKU 10150, Net wt. 5oz. Product is refrigerated. Recall
item.product: Fresh to You Burger Chicken Fillet, SKU 10150, Net wt. 5oz. Product is refrigerated.
item.summary: Raw breaded chicken patties were inadvertently used in the ready to eat Burger Chicken Fillet sandwich. Raw breaded chicken patties pose a risk of foodborne illness due to the potential presence of Salmonella. Product details: Fresh to You Burger Chicken Fillet, SKU 10150, Net wt. 5oz. Product is refrigerated. UPC 1 00000 01015 0. Manufactured By LPK1 Renton, WA. Product was not sold at retail stores and sold only to employees at certain business' breakroom.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
